description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a light, weathered plank texture and visible grain patterns. The box features a large red label with two upward-pointing arrows and the words 'THIS SIDE UP' on one side, indicating proper orientation for handling. There are visible stains and marks, including a prominent brownish smear and some dark smudges, suggesting the box has been used or stored in a rugged environment. A shipping label is affixed to the top surface, further indicating its use for transport or delivery. The box appears solid and sturdy, with no visible handles or locking mechanisms. Its design and markings suggest it is intended for shipping, storage, or temporary placement in urban or industrial settings.
description: A weathered wooden storage box with a red 'THIS SIDE UP' label, shipping label, and visible stains, designed for transport or storage.
description_view_0: This side shows a light wooden plank surface with a large brownish smear and part of a shipping label visible on the top.
description_view_1: This view features a prominent red 'THIS SIDE UP' label with two arrows, set against the wooden planks, and part of the shipping label on top.
description_view_2: This side displays a lighter, relatively clean wooden surface with dark smudges and stains, and the shipping label partially visible on top.
description_view_3: This view shows a plain, clean wooden plank surface with minimal markings and the shipping label partially visible on the top.
